NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​LocalFileAppCastDownloader
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IAppCastDataDownloader
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​Downloaders.​LocalFileAppCastDownloader

Class that takes care of downloading data for an app cast, including the app cast itself as well as the app cast signature (if available). Allows you to send extra JSON with your request for the app cast information.

Functions
LocalFileAppCastDownloader
public LocalFileAppCastDownloader()

Default constructor for the app cast data downloader. Basically does nothing. :)

Properties
UseLocalUriPath
public bool UseLocalUriPath {
get;
set
}

When handling the string url in DownloadAndGetAppCastData, treat the url as a Uri and use Uri.LocalPath as the path to read text from.

Functions
DownloadAndGetAppCastData
public string DownloadAndGetAppCastData(
string 
url
)
DownloadAndGetAppCastDataAsync
public async Task<string> DownloadAndGetAppCastDataAsync(
string 
url
)
GetAppCastEncoding
public Encoding GetAppCastEncoding()
